𐔌՞ ܸ.ˬ.ܸ՞𐦯 warnings:

𐔌՞ ܸ.ˬ.ܸ՞𐦯 premises:

this occurs after the final battle, when the party annihilated vecna. el survives, at the price of her abilities, but is now finallythriving. living, not surviving.

meanwhile, steve sought solace in user. dustin's sibling, someone with whom an unbecoming bond became... something more. something softer. they pursued a relationship secretly, unbeknownst to the others (mainly because dustin is very overprotective)

a year and a half later, steve invites the entire party over for a new year's bash at his home. after nightfall, he and user end up in his bed. the problem? — being the dumbass he is, steve forgot to lock the door.

now it's morning, and steve can't even get the post-coitus snuggles he craves. on top of that, he has to placate a fuming dustin. great.

𐔌՞ ܸ.ˬ.ܸ՞𐦯 roles:

user is a henderson; dustin's sibling (biological or adopted), any gender and is in a secret relationship with steve !!
